description: You are a BIM Information Manager at a main contractor preparing an architectural model for FM handover. The university client's Asset Information Requirements (AIR) dictate that all maintainable assets—specifically doors and windows—must carry a bespoke property set. Using the FZK-Haus residential model pre-loaded in Bonsai, create the custom property set and properties defined in the EIR specification document found on the desktop. Apply this property set with the strictly required IFC data types to at least 8 doors and/or windows in the model. Save the enriched IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_eir_compliant.ifc.
